_comment: Single source of truth for the DevPT app catalog. Edit apps here; index.html's 'Practice tools' nav and footer list are rendered from this file by app.js. To add a full marketing plate, also add an <article class="plate" id="app-<id>"> block in index.html. placement values: 'hero' | 'nav' | 'plate' | 'footer'.

apps.name: PainMap
apps.blurb: Pain in three dimensions — a research instrument beyond the 0–10 scale.

apps.name: EMRsim
apps.blurb: Documentation that behaves like a real chart.

apps.name: VSPx Chat
apps.blurb: A virtual patient to interview, on demand.

apps.name: Aquatic Therapy
apps.blurb: How the body responds to water.
apps.note: Repo deploy workflow is currently gated on a missing Azure secret (inert) as of 2026-06; verify the subdomain is actually serving.

apps.name: DevPT Lab
apps.blurb: The whole encounter, start to finish.

apps.name: ScopeOrNope
apps.blurb: Refer or treat? Triage decisions, one swipe at a time.
apps.note: Promoted from unlisted 2026-06-27 (P1 #10). Footer-only, design-safe. Live URL verified HTTP 200 (GitHub Pages SPA, title 'ScopeOrNope | Clinical Triage').

apps.name: Wellness
apps.blurb: The eight dimensions of wellness, one case at a time.
apps.note: Promoted from unlisted 2026-06-27 (P1 #10). Footer-only, design-safe. Live URL verified HTTP 200 (Vite/React SPA; JS bundle loads 200; populations + 8 wellness-domain case-study data confirmed in repo).

apps.name: PT Rapid Recall
apps.blurb: Muscles and nerves, on instant recall.
apps.note: Promoted from unlisted 2026-06-27 (P1 #10). Footer-only, design-safe. Real Azure SWA hostname discovered (region prefix '.4') and verified HTTP 200, serving 'Anatomy Database / PT Rapid Recall' search UI. Next.js+Prisma standalone build; no devpt.app subdomain assigned, so the raw SWA URL is used for now.

unlisted.name: MASH / IMU Connect
unlisted.note: IMU motion-capture platform (ESP32 + React/three.js, Azure SWA). URL TBD. Reviewed for hub promotion 2026-06-27 (P1 #10) and deliberately LEFT UNLISTED: it is a hardware-bound biomechanics RESEARCH instrument — it requires physical ESP32-S3 IMU sensors connected over WebSerial/USB to do anything, has no standalone student-facing content, and no verifiable public URL was found (the deploy workflow lists only Azure token-name fallbacks, no committed hostname; default-host probes 404). Not appropriate for the PT-education student hub.

engines.role: Branching clinical-scenario engine; consumed by devpt as a git submodule.
Shared 3D rig/pose library; consumed by 3DPainMap, anatomy-viewer, aquatic-therapy. Currently also the de-facto source of the runtime mannequin GLBs.
Intended canonical mannequin GLB assets — currently UNCONSUMED (apps copy GLBs from pose-engine/models instead). Resolve the source of truth.
